task_completion.description: Verify that a new reference item was created with the type 'Artwork'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' field should be set to 'Artwork'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the Jurism info pane contains 'The Problem We All Live With'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Artist field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The creator field is set to 'Artist' with the first name 'Norman' and last name 'Rockwell'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field in the Jurism info pane contains '1964'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Medium field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Medium' or 'Artwork Medium' field in the Jurism info pane contains 'Oil on canvas'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Archive field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Archive' field in the Jurism info pane contains 'Norman Rockwell Museum'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Abstract field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Abstract' field in the Jurism info pane contains the text: 'Iconic painting depicting Ruby Bridges being escorted by U.S. Marshals during the desegregation of New Orleans schools.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jurism graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Jurism application window open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual Jurism application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be visible inside the Jurism info pane fields, not just typed into a separate text editor, browser, or notes application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQLite commands or scripts directly modifying the Jurism database files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target artwork is 'The Problem We All Live With' by Norman Rockwell. The date should be entered as 1964 (the year it was published in Look magazine). The medium is 'Oil on canvas' and the archive is the 'Norman Rockwell Museum'.
